sections.name: Section 1
sections.content_preview: **Subject:** If the 3+3 is working → more pairs add rotation

sections.name: Section 7
sections.content_preview:
> *"We saw the first pause in week 3. By week 5, she was initiating once a week. The BCBA said the consistency from having enough pairs in rotation made the difference."* 
>, L2 mom, sensory 6-year-ol
